creator: mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com
text:
After this update, `make test' fails as follows:

* pop3d 1.1.0
  [8.5.9] comm                  ~~ FAILS T    22 P    21 S     0 F     1
  [8.5.9] multiplexer           ~~ FAILS T     9 P     8 S     0 F     1
  [8.5.9] pop3                  ~~ FAILS T    45 P    44 S     0 F     1
  [8.5.9] tepam                 ~~ ERR   T   820 P   820 S     0 F     0

This should be fixed -- either by identifying the detected bug or by 
patching (or disabling) the broken test(s). Authors' own tests are too 
precious to ignore. Yours,

    -mi
